examples.sentence: 雨が降ったからといって、試合が中止になるわけではありません。
examples.translation: Just because it rained doesn't mean the game will be canceled.
examples.translationEn: Just because it rained doesnt mean the game will be canceled
examples.romaji: Ame ga futta kara to itte, shiai ga chuushi ni naru wake de wa arimasen.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Just because it rained doesnt mean the game will be canceled

examples.sentence: 彼が有名だからといって、彼の意見がいつも正しいわけではない。
examples.translation: Just because he is famous doesn't mean his opinions are always correct.
examples.translationEn: Just because he is famous doesnt mean his opinions are always correct
examples.romaji: Kare ga yuumei da kara to itte, kare no iken ga itsumo tadashii wake de wa nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Just because he is famous doesnt mean his opinions are always correct

examples.sentence: このスープが辛いからといって、全ての人が辛いと感じるわけではない。
examples.translation: Just because this soup is spicy doesn't mean everyone will find it spicy.
examples.translationEn: Just because this soup is spicy doesnt mean everyone will find it spicy
examples.romaji: Kono suupu ga karai kara to itte, subete no hito ga karai to kanjiru wake de wa nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Just because this soup is spicy doesnt mean everyone will find it spicy

examples.sentence: 彼女が泣いているからといって、悲しいわけではないかもしれない。
examples.translation: Just because she is crying doesn't necessarily mean she's sad.
examples.translationEn: Just because she is crying doesnt necessarily mean shes sad
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga naiteiru kara to itte, kanashii wake de wa nai kamoshirenai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Just because she is crying doesnt necessarily mean shes sad

examples.sentence: 午前９時から午後５時にかけて、仕事をしています。
examples.translation: I work from 9 in the morning to 5 in the evening.
examples.translationEn: I work from 9 in the morning to 5 in the evening
examples.romaji: Gozen ku-ji kara gogo go-ji ni kakete, shigoto wo shite imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I work from 9 in the morning to 5 in the evening

examples.sentence: 東京から大阪にかけて、新幹線が走っています。
examples.translation: The bullet train runs from Tokyo to Osaka.
examples.translationEn: The bullet train runs from Tokyo to Osaka
examples.romaji: Toukyou kara Oosaka ni kakete, shinkansen ga hashitte imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: The bullet train runs from Tokyo to Osaka

examples.sentence: 春から夏にかけて、花がたくさん咲いています。
examples.translation: Many flowers bloom between spring and summer.
examples.translationEn: Many flowers bloom between spring and summer
examples.romaji: Haru kara natsu ni kakete, hana ga takusan saite imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Many flowers bloom between spring and summer

examples.sentence: ２０歳から３０歳にかけて、多くの人が大学を卒業し、仕事に就くことが一般的です。
examples.translation: It is common for many people to graduate from university and start working between the ages of 20 and 30.
examples.translationEn: It is common for many people to graduate from university and start working between the ages of 20 and 30
examples.romaji: Hatachi kara sanjuu-sai ni kakete, ooku no hito ga daigaku wo sotsugyou shi, shigoto ni tsuku koto ga ippan-teki desu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: It is common for many people to graduate from university and start working between the ages of 20 and 30

examples.sentence: 試験に合格したからには、一所懸命働かなければならない。
examples.translation: Since I passed the exam, I have to work hard.
examples.translationEn: Since I passed the exam, I have to work hard
examples.romaji: Shiken ni goukaku shita kara niwa, isshokenmei hatarakanakereba naranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Since I passed the exam, I have to work hard

examples.sentence: 約束したからには、守らなければなりません。
examples.translation: Since I made a promise, I must keep it.
examples.translationEn: Since I made a promise, I must keep it
examples.romaji: Yakusoku shita kara niwa, mamoranakereba narimasen.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Since I made a promise, I must keep it

examples.sentence: この映画が面白いからには、友達にも見せたい。
examples.translation: Since this movie is interesting, I want to show it to my friends too.

examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Since this movie is interesting, I want to show it to my friends too

examples.translation: Since she asked for help, I must help her.
examples.translationEn: Since she asked for help, I must help her

examples.translation: In terms of taste, I think this restaurant is delicious.
